---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 提出功能建议
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? / 是否与某个问题相关？**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like / 描述你期望的解决方案**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered / 你考虑过的替代方案**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context / 补充信息**
Any other context or screenshots.
